--- 
title: "Introduction to Microeconomics"
author: "Udayan Roy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
---

# Preface {-}

I hope to publish here my lecture notes for a course called Introduction to Microeconomics that I have taught for three decades.

The required textbook for my course is *Principles of Microeconomics* by N. Gregory Mankiw. Although Mankiw's is an excellent book, I have constantly felt the need to make many small changes. Until now, I have been making these changes in my PowerPoint slides. But the availability of new technology – especially *R*, *R Studio*, the *bookdown* package in R, and *Github* – has made it easy for me to gather my slides and turn them into a free online version that reads like a textbook. Also, reading slides usually makes for a choppy experience. A fleshed out set of lecture notes may be more helpful to students.
